verifier_result_values.grade_rationale:
## Evidence
The agent’s final response states: “It lacks any provision requiring or indicating that an itemized monthly statement listing all separate charges incurred by the resident will be provided to the resident or representative.”

No file artifacts were provided.

## Assessment
- Criterion requirement: States that California Code of Regulations Title 22, Division 6, Chapter 8, section 87507(g)(3)(H) requires admission agreements to contain “a provision indicating that an itemized monthly statement that lists all separate charges incurred by the resident that are collected by the facility shall be provided to the resident or the resident’s representative, if any.”
- Conclusion: The criterion is not fully met. The agent’s response captures part of the requirement—an itemized monthly statement listing separate charges provided to the resident or representative—but it does not state that the requirement applies to admission agreements and omits the specific qualifier that the charges are those “collected by the facility” and the phrase “if any” regarding the resident’s representative. Because the criterion requires this specific regulatory requirement to be stated, the response is incomplete.

## Evidence
The agent’s final text response states: “It lacks any provision requiring or indicating that an itemized monthly statement listing all separate charges incurred by the resident will be provided to the resident or representative.”

## Assessment
- Criterion requirement: The response must state that the template “does not contain a provision indicating that an itemized monthly statement that lists all separate charges incurred by the resident that are collected by the facility shall be provided to the resident or the resident’s representative.”
- Conclusion: The criterion is not fully met. The agent states noncompliance and mentions the absence of a provision for an itemized monthly statement listing separate charges incurred by the resident and provided to the resident or representative. However, it does not include the specific required qualifier that the charges are “collected by the facility.” Under the criterion’s specific wording, this missing element prevents a full match.

## Evidence
The agent’s final text response states: “No, the General Resident Agreement Template does not comply with CCR Title 22 §87507(g)(3)(H).” It further explains that the template lacks a provision about providing an itemized monthly statement.

## Assessment
- Criterion requirement: “States that the General Resident Agreement Template does not comply with California Code of Regulations Title 22, Division 6, Chapter 8, section 87507(g)(3)(H).”
- Conclusion: The criterion is met. The response explicitly states that the General Resident Agreement Template does not comply with CCR Title 22 §87507(g)(3)(H), which is the same regulation referenced in the criterion.
